message:
feat(vdbe): add vectorized hash-join operator with inner/left/semi/anti variants

Implements bd-14vp7.4: two-phase hash-join with build/probe, NULL key
exclusion, gather-based output construction for all column types, and
14 new tests (343 VDBE total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
